name: Please Take Me with You!! I Can Be of Great Help to You!!

issues.description: Condition checks 'HasCardOnBoard' (Jinbe as character on board) but text requires Leader to be Jinbe. Should use 'LeaderIsName' condition type.
Missing hand size condition (2 or less cards in hand). Condition object lacks the 'handSize' or equivalent constraint.
Second effect (ReturnToHand targeting opponent character) has no basis in card text. This effect should not exist.
Trigger type 'Trigger' is non-standard and undefined. Effect should be removed entirely as it contradicts the card text.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] If your Leader is [Jinbe] and you have 2 or less cards in your hand, draw 2 cards.
